ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_smells" (
  "smell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code smell */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of code smell (e.g., Long Method, Complex Method) */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace where the code smell was detected */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class where the code smell was detected */,
  "file" TEXT /* File where the code smell was detected */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method where the code smell was detected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code smell */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the code smell (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code smell was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the code smell was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the code smell was detected */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the code smell was detected */,
  "code_snippet" TEXT /* Snippet of the code that contains the smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("smell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_smells_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project repository */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "analysis_settings" TEXT /* Analysis settings for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "smell_count" INTEGER /* Number of code smells detected */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was last updated */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-user association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project-user association was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smell_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "smell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the code smell */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the code smell */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the code smell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smell_history_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smell_history_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smell_history_smell_id FOREIGN KEY ("smell_id") REFERENCES code_smells ("smell_id")
)
